label: Chicago Sketch — gridlock events
source: Chicago Sketch GMNS test network · DTALite 15-min link_performance + gridlock_events (synthetic demonstration network).

narration.text: Volume/queue feed (no corridor speed). Height = volume, red tail = measured queue spillback (queue_exb) growing upstream from the stop line. Watch queues build as events fire.
